title: agelanthus falcifolius
intro: Agelanthus falcifolius, also known as the "bitter leaf" or "false star apple", is a plant species in the family Loranthaceae. This hemi-parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. The health benefits of Agelanthus falcifolius include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and aiding in the treatment of malaria and other diseases. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the leaves in water, and it is also used in various herbal preparations such as tinctures and ointments.
